title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a course creator from Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you're blocked from using Teachable or Gumroad, you're not alone. Many creators face restrictions on popular platforms due to country or banking limitations. But you don't have to give up on selling your digital products. You need a permanent structural alternative to get paid. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, offering the Core Shop Engine, a full backend solution that automates delivery and payment verification, and works everywhere, including restricted countries. But before we dive into that, let's break down your real options.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad may be popular, but they come with restrictions. PayPal won't work in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan due to anti-money laundering laws, while Stripe has limitations on certain countries. Gumroad has a blocked countries list, and Teachable has restrictions on countries with high risk or non-compliance. Meanwhile, Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine ($49.99) provides a full backend solution with automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, no payment processor account required, and works everywhere, including restricted countries. It's the permanent structural alternative you need to get paid.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Each platform handles restricted countries differently. PayPal and Stripe have country-by-country restrictions, while Gumroad has a blanket ban on certain countries. Teachable has a list of high-risk or non-compliant countries. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, is designed to work everywhere, including restricted countries, making it the best option for creators who need to sell digital products in countries with limited access to popular platforms.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

The crypto payment alternative is not a workaround — it is a structurally different approach to commerce. NOWPayments operates as a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT on multiple chains, Solana, and Tron. Transactions settle directly to a wallet you control. There is no platform holding period, no payout schedule, and no compliance department deciding whether your country is permitted to receive funds. The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments via webhook, which means every confirmed transaction automatically triggers delivery — no manual steps, no delays, no dependency on a platform that can suspend your access.
Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine is the permanent structural alternative you need to get paid in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities also differ across platforms. PayPal and Stripe require manual payment processing, while Gumroad has limited automation options. Teachable has some automation features, but its delivery capabilities are limited. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, offers automated delivery and payment verification, making it the best option for creators who want to streamline their sales process and get paid faster.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

You can use Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine ($49.99) to sell your courses without Teachable or Gumroad. It's the best PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries, offering automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, no payment processor account required, and works everywhere, including countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan.
Selling your courses without Teachable or Gumroad requires a solution that works everywhere, including restricted countries, like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan.
